input: WITH kind_stats AS (SELECT __kind, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM objects GROUP BY __kind), ranked AS (SELECT __kind, cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) as rank FROM kind_stats) SELECT __kind, cnt, rank FROM ranked WHERE rank <= 3 ORDER BY rank
expected: WITH kind_stats AS (SELECT __kind, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM objects WHERE __workspace = 'ws2' GROUP BY __kind), ranked AS (SELECT __kind, cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rank FROM kind_stats) SELECT __kind, cnt, rank FROM ranked WHERE rank <= 3 ORDER BY rank ASC
